key: # CONTACT.CSV  —  Controls the Contact page content.
# HOW TO EDIT:  Change only the "value" column. Never rename the "key" column.
# LINKS:        For each contact item you can optionally add a clickable link.
#               Fill in item_link_N with a full URL (https://…) or mailto: address.
# COMMENTS:     Any row whose key starts with # is ignored by the site.

value: For exhibition proposals, acquisition enquiries, or studio visits — get in touch.
description: The introductory sentence shown above the contact list. Can be as long as you like.

key: # Each item appears as one row in the contact list: label on the left  value on the right.
# item_link_N is optional — leave empty if the item should not be a clickable link.
# Add more items as needed: item_label_4 / item_value_4 / item_link_4  etc.

description: Label shown on the left of the first contact row
The actual email address (or any text) shown on the right
Makes the value a clickable link. Use mailto: for emails  https:// for web links. Leave empty for plain text.
Instagram handle or any display text
Full URL for the Instagram profile
Your city or any location text
Leave empty — location is not a link
